$schema_comment: Course facts for Big Sur International Marathon. Every entry MUST have a source citation and verified date. Nothing here gets pushed to the Watch without passing lib/course-validator.ts. Do not edit this file without citing a primary source.

race.name: Big Sur International Marathon
race.description: Point-to-point marathon along California Highway 1 from Big Sur Station to Carmel.

sources.title: Marathon Course Info — Big Sur International Marathon (official)

phases.label: Redwood descent
phases.note: Fresh legs — hold back. The descent will tempt you 15 sec/mi too fast.

phases.label: Rolling to Hurricane base
phases.note: Settle into breath. Hurricane Point looms at mile 10.

phases.label: Hurricane Point climb
phases.note: Two miles up at ~5%. Hold effort, don't chase pace.

sources.title: Official course info — Hurricane Point grade
sources.verified_quote: a 5% grade that rises 560 feet over 2 miles between miles 10 and 12

phases.label: Descent to Bixby Bridge
phases.note: Recovery downhill — grand piano drifts up from Bixby below. Bixby Bridge at mile 13.1 is the halfway point.

sources.verified_quote: Bixby Bridge serves as the halfway point of the Marathon

phases.label: Highway 1 bluffs
phases.note: Relentless rolling. Each hill is short — power up, flow down.

phases.label: Carmel Highlands finish
phases.note: Strawberry Station at mile 23.2. Last real climb at mile 25.

landmarks.label: Hurricane Point summit
landmarks.note: You crested the big one. Protect your quads on the descent.

landmarks.label: Bixby Bridge · halfway
landmarks.note: Pianist plays at the bridge. Halfway point of the race.

sources.verified_quote: Bixby Bridge serves as the halfway point of the Marathon [...] complete with a tuxedo-clad pianist

landmarks.label: Strawberry Station
landmarks.note: Unofficial aid — locals offering strawberries and water. Take one.

sources.verified_quote: The Strawberry Station is at mile 23.2

landmarks.label: Last real climb
landmarks.note: The final test. Empty the tank to the finish.

hurricane_point_drummers.reason: Widely reported in race blogs and unofficial reports, but not found in primary source (bigsurmarathon.org) during 2026-04-19 verification. DO NOT ship to Watch until re-verified against a primary source or confirmed by the runner in person.

grand_piano.reason: Located at Bixby Bridge halfway point, audible earlier as you descend Hurricane Point.

warnings.fact_drift: Race-day aid stations, music performers, and landmarks can change year to year. Re-verify against the current year's race bible (PDF on bigsurmarathon.org) before race day. Schema flag: re-verify when `verified_at` is older than 60 days.
warnings.gpx_source: The synthesized GPX in web/public/sample-bigsur.gpx is for algorithm development only. Race-day plan MUST be built from a real official or recorded GPX (David's 2024 Strava/Garmin export is the current ground truth for 2026 since the course hasn't changed).
